Delhi College of Art Entrance Examinatio.official_note: College of Art (Univ. of Delhi), colart.delhi.gov.in. The provided /admissions URL is dead (404). The notifications page (verified) is where the official entrance/practical-test merit & eligible-candidate lists are published, e.g. 'LIST OF ELIGIBLE CANDIDATES FOR PRACTICAL TEST AND VIVA VOCE MFA 2026'. BFA admission = CUET (50%) + practical-based entrance test (50%); lists are name-based, not college/branch rank cutoffs.

English and Foreign Languages University.official_note: EFLU Hyderabad. The provided /admissions2025 URL is dead (404). UG admission (incl. BA Pashto/Persian) is now entirely CUET-UG based with no separate EFLU UG entrance; merit lists are published via the homepage admissions section (UG public-notice PDF and CUET counselling). PG/PhD use Samarth portals. No public college/branch rank cutoff table.

Goa Common Entrance Test.official_note: DTE Goa. GCET as an exam has been discontinued (2025+ B.E. admission is JEE Main-based). The current authoritative documents are the 'MERIT LIST - B.E.' and 'Eligibility List - B.E.' PDFs (2026) on this verified DTE degree-admission-lists page. GCET answer keys/results archive also at dte.goa.gov.in/result/gcet-results. Merit lists are candidate-rank lists, not college/branch cutoff tables.

Goa Common Entrance Test – Engineering.official_note: DTE Goa engineering (B.E.) admissions. Verified page hosts 'MERIT LIST - B.E.' (2026-06-18) and 'Eligibility List - B.E.' (2026-06-08) PDFs. GCET engineering exam discontinued; B.E. merit now JEE Main-based. Lists are candidate-rank merit lists, not college-wise rank cutoffs.

Goa Polytechnic Entrance Examination.official_note: DTE Goa diploma/polytechnic admissions. Verified page hosts 'MERIT LIST - FIRST YEAR AND SECOND YEAR DIPLOMA COURSES' (2026-05-27, 12 MB) and 'DIPLOMA ELIGIBILITY LIST' (2026-05-22) PDFs. Diploma merit is based on qualifying-exam marks; documents are candidate merit lists, not college/branch rank cutoff tables.

Gujarat Common Entrance Test – Polytechn.official_note: Official ACPDC (Admission Committee for Professional Diploma Courses), Gujarat NIC e-counselling portal for diploma/polytechnic admissions (verified). The provided acpdc.gujarat.gov.in/meritlist.aspx URL is dead (404); this NIC portal is the live authoritative source for merit list / seat allotment / cutoffs. already_has_data=true, so no extraction performed.

Haryana Agriculture Entrance Examination.official_note: CCS Haryana Agricultural University (CCSHAU) online pre-admission portal (verified, 'CCSHAU :: ONLINE PRE-ADMISSION'). Admission via CCSHAU CET; merit lists are published per round but are accessed behind candidate login, so no public static college/branch rank cutoff table is exposed.
